timemachine.timemachine_available.derivation: Added at ingest; not from Bart flat file.

player_aggregates.team_height_max.derivation: Max height among rotation players (>10% min share).

player_aggregates.star_usg_share.derivation: Max player usage / sum team usage.

player_aggregates.top2_usg_share.derivation: Sum of top-2 usages / sum team usage.

player_aggregates.roster_sr_pct.derivation: Share of minutes from Jr and Sr players.

seed_pair_win_rates.historical_win_rate.derivation: Aggregated from tournament_training_set outcomes by seed pair.

seed_pair_win_rates.last_5yr_win_rate.derivation: Aggregated from tournament_training_set outcomes by seed pair.

seed_pair_win_rates.upset_occurred_pct.derivation: Aggregated from tournament_training_set outcomes by seed pair.
